docs.title: ☕ Awesome Java & Kotlin
docs.text: A curated collection of Java, Kotlin, and JVM ecosystem resources including tutorials, frameworks, libraries, tools, and best practices for developers at every level.

docs.title: ☕ Java Resources
docs.text:
Core Java concepts, collections, streams, concurrency, JVM, and more.

➡️ Browse Java Resources

docs.title: 🟣 Kotlin Resources
docs.text:
Modern Kotlin language features, coroutines, and JVM development.

➡️ Browse Kotlin Resources

docs.title: 🍃 Spring Ecosystem
docs.text:
Spring Boot, Spring Security, Spring Cloud, and enterprise Java development.

➡️ Browse Spring Resources

docs.title: ☕ Java Resources
docs.text:
• Learn.java - Official Java learning platform for beginners, students, and teachers featuring tutorials, interactive exercises, projects, and a Java Playground

  • Inside Java - Official Oracle Java team portal providing Java news, OpenJDK updates, JVM insights, podcasts, technical articles, and information about upcoming Java features

docs.title: 🟣 Kotlin Resources
docs.text: • Kotlin - Official Kotlin website with documentation, tutorials, playgrounds, language references, and guides for Android, backend, AI, and multiplatform development. Kotlin is a modern JVM language designed to work seamlessly with Java.

docs.title: 📚 Awesome List
docs.text: • Awesome Spring A complete curated collection of books, tutorials, courses, blogs, videos, and real-world projects for the Spring ecosystem (Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring Security, etc.).
